messages.subject: [R-sig-dyn-mod] Model comparison in deSolve/FME
messages.body_plain:
Hello everyone,

I am wondering about people's preferences on doing model comparison
with different systems of ODEs. I noticed that there isn't a built-in
method for calculating AIC values in the deSolve/FME packages. Is there
another, preferred, method for model comparison other than information
criteria?

Any advice would be appreciated.

Thank you,
Michael

-- 
Michael Stemkovski
PhD student - W. Pearse lab
Ecology Center
Utah State University

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
